# PR Review Judge — Static allow (trivial paths)
#
# Format: one ERE (extended regex) pattern per line.
# Lines starting with # and empty lines are ignored.
# Matches changed file paths relative to the repo root.
# If ALL changed files match at least one pattern, the PR is
# auto-approved with the `skip-human-review` label.

# Markdown documentation (README.md, CLAUDE.md, etc.)
(^|/)[^/]+\.md$

# Static assets under public/
^public/

# .gitignore
^\.gitignore$
